title: Poondi Madha Basilica
tagline: Poondi Madha Basilica — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, also known as Poondi Madha Basilica, is a Catholic pilgrimage centre located in Tamil Nadu, South India.
overview.description: Basilica of Our Lady of Lourdes, also known as Poondi Madha Basilica, is a Catholic pilgrimage centre located in Tamil Nadu, South India. It is located in Alamelupuram-Poondi, a small village located adjacent to Thirukattupalli in Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vishnampettai
topPlaces.description: Vishnampettai is a large village in Budalur block, Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. This village is located in the banks of Kaveri River, Kollidam River and Kudamurutti River.

topPlaces.name: Iravathesvarar Temple, Nemam
topPlaces.description: Iravathesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Nemam in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvaneshwar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruvaneshwar Temple is a Shiva temple located at Ranganathapuram in the Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu. The temple is dedicated to Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Elangadu
topPlaces.description: Elangadu is an Indian village situated on the banks of the river Cauvery. It is about 12 kilometers from Kallanai, the Grand Anicut.

topPlaces.name: Ranganathapuram
topPlaces.description: Ranganathapuram is a village in the Thiruvaiyaru taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu in India. It is located at about 2 km from Agarapettai and about 2 km from Thirukattupalli.

topPlaces.name: Maickelpatti
topPlaces.description: Maickelpatti is a village in the Budalur block of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mariamman Temple, Anbil
topPlaces.description: Mariamman Temple, Anbil, is a Hindu temple located at Anbil, Trichy district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Divyagnanesvarar Temple, Koviladi
topPlaces.description: Divyagnanesvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Koviladi in Thanjavur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Poondi Madha Basilica?
faq.a: The best time to visit Poondi Madha Basilica is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Poondi Madha Basilica?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (27 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (28 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Poondi Madha Basilica?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Poondi Madha Basilica at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Poondi Madha Basilica?
faq.a: Stays in Poondi Madha Basilica start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Poondi Madha Basilica?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vishnampettai, Iravathesvarar Temple, Nemam, Tiruvaneshwar Temple, Elangadu, Ranganathapuram.
